title: nature-climate-ai: Interpretable Discovery of Lagged Climate Precursors for Vegetation-Index Stress across Australia
description: Reproducible research package for discovering climate precursors of satellite-observed vegetation stress across Australia. Phase 1 regional-scale SCI paper targeting Remote Sensing (MDPI). Uses MODIS (MOD13Q1/MYD13Q1) vegetation indices and ERA5-Land climate reanalysis on a unified 0.25-degree shared grid, 2000-2025.
